chatWithMessages.assistantMessage:
Ek is Kai — 'n persoonlike assistent wat bly en jou werklik leer ken.

```kai-ui
{"type": "column", "children": [{"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Ek onthou", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Jou voorkeure, projekte, hoe jy dinge gedoen wil hê. Volgende maand weet ek nog steeds.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Ek kry dinge gedoen", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Herinnerings, e-pos, kalender, shell-opdragte — ingeskakel by jou toestel en jou lewe.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "card", "children": [{"type": "text", "value": "Ek leer", "style": "title", "bold": true}, {"type": "text", "value": "Nie net feite nie, maar patrone. Wat vir jou werk, wat nie. Ek word beter met verloop van tyd.", "style": "body"}]}, {"type": "button", "label": "Kom ons gaan", "action": {"type": "callback", "event": "start"}}, {"type": "button", "label": "Stel my op", "action": {"type": "callback", "event": "setup"}}]}
```
